title: Actinocephalus bongardii
taxonomy: Actinocephalus bongardii is classified in the family Eriocaulaceae. This family comprises plants that are commonly known as pipeworts or fairy cotton. Actinocephalus bongardii, being a part of this family, is a type of flowering plant native to South America. The Eriocaulaceae family consists of approximately 1,000 species, many of which are found in tropical regions. Actinocephalus bongardii's classification is further divided into various taxonomic ranks, including genus, species, and kingdom.
